title: User Guides - App Settings Menu > User Guide
scenario: User Guides section in Poly Studio Mobile app Settings lists onboarding guides for Free 20/Free 60/Free 60+ and user guides for other devices, with back button and support link
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the menu icon or navigate to App Settings.
Tap on 'User Guides' in the App Settings menu.
expected: The User Guides page displays a list of supported devices with images. Onboarding guides are shown for Free 20, Free 60, and Free 60+. User guides are shown for all other devices. A "Not seeing your device?" link and an "Other devices" button are present. Tapping the "Other devices" button opens the Poly support web page. A back button is present in the top left corner.
